title: icacina oliviformis var. oliviformis
intro: Icacina oliviformis var. oliviformis, also known as the African yam daisy or Icacina, is a plant species belonging to the family Icacinaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Icacina oliviformis var. oliviformis include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine in Africa.
